keywords.job: I am the leader of the Cenath caste.
keywords.name: My name is Eroth Ramathi.
keywords.time: That is a inferior concept invented by the minor races.
keywords.carlin: Their druids seek my counsel quite often. I provide them with as many insights their little minds can keep up with and I feel appropriate.
keywords.thais: A city of filth and dirt. Any elf should visit this city at least once to see what a society without good guidance can become.
keywords.venore: The merchants of venore have prooven usefull and are therefore tolerated.
keywords.roderick: A stupid human who won't comprehend our complex society.
keywords.olrik: A human who dreams to become an elf. It would be funny if it were not that pathetic.
keywords.king: Our people have no use for kings or queens.
keywords.tibianus: Our people have no use for kings or queens.
keywords.elves: Our people are the children of light and darkness, the heirs of dusk and dawn.
keywords.dwarfs: The diggers are not welcome in our realm.
keywords.humans: We tolerate them and allow them to be used by us.
keywords.troll: The Kuridai have the distasteful habit to keep some trolls for inferior work.
keywords.cenath: We are the shepherds of our people. The other castes need our guidance.
keywords.kuridai: The Kuridai are aggressive and victims of their instincts. Without our help they would surely die in a foolish war.
keywords.deraisim: They lack the understanding of unity. We are keeping them together and prevent them from being slaughtered one by one.
keywords.abdaisim: They are fools and almost deserve the extinction that awaits them. Though we will take it upon us to rescue even them by leading them home.
keywords.teshial: They are gone. They alone were almost equal to us Cenath among elvenkind.
keywords.dreamer: The Teshial were masters of the so called dream magic.
keywords.dream: The dream masters, though overestimated, wielded some impressive power without much practical use.
keywords.master: The dream masters, though overestimated, wielded some impressive power without much practical use.
keywords.dreammaster: The dream masters, though overestimated, wielded some impressive power without much practical use.
keywords.ferumbras: A human born evil. Another evidence of the destructive potential of that race.
keywords.crunor: Gods are for the weak. We will master the world on our own. We need no gods.
keywords.news: I heared the new human settlement in the west became independent from the human empire.
keywords.magic: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.druid: Druids master spells of defence, healing, and nature.
keywords.sorcerer: Sorcerers are not attuned to nature and therefore can't master it.
keywords.vocation: You are narrow minded to think in such boundaries.
keywords.spellbook: Cenath rarely use spellbooks. The minor castes rely on them though.
keywords.spell: I can teach the spells 'Magic Shield', 'Invisible', 'Destroy Field', 'Creature Illusion', 'Chameleon', 'Convince Creature', and 'Summon Creature'.
keywords.shield: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.destroy: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.field: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids and paladins.
keywords.chameleon: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.creature: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.illusion: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.convince: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.
keywords.summon: I'm sorry, but this spell is only for druids.

texts: I am the leader of the Cenath caste.

entries.response: You need to advance to magic level %A to learn this spell.
You do not have enough gold to pay my services.
From now on you can cast this spell.
